_meta.method: User-flagged additions: Korean Zen presence in South Florida that the round-3 USA agent missed.
_meta.coverageEstimate: Specific gap-fixes; not a comprehensive sweep.

places.name: Bo Hyun Sa
places.notes: Korean Buddhist temple of the Chogye Order serving the Korean Buddhist community of Fort Lauderdale, Miami, and West Palm Beach. Hosts the South Florida Zen Group (Kwan Um) for Saturday-morning practice. The Kwan Um sangha itself is captured separately in the main us.json file.
